understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete puzzle levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Progressing through all levels by solving each grid-based puzzle within a limited step budget wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions move the currently selected piece in the chosen direction on a pixel grid. Adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed if there is empty space behind them. Walls and other obstacles can block movement, sometimes unexpectedly, requiring trial and error. Multiple selectable pieces exist per level, and switching control is done with CLICK actions targeting the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable piece. The semantic grid uses symbols to represent the state, with the goal being to occupy every '+' goal tile with a selectable piece.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete puzzle levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously. Progressing through all levels by solving each grid-based puzzle within a limited step budget wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions move the currently selected piece in the chosen direction on a pixel grid. Adjacent pushable blocks can be pushed if there is empty space behind them. Walls and other obstacles can block movement, sometimes unexpectedly, requiring trial and error. Multiple selectable pieces exist per level, and switching control is done with CLICK actions targeting the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable piece. The semantic grid uses symbols to represent the state, with the goal being to occupy every '+' goal tile with a selectable piece.
